nasb.text: For though your people, O Israel, may be like the sand of the sea, Only a remnant within them will return; A destruction is determined, overflowing with righteousness.

esv.text: For though your people Israel be as the sand of the sea, only a remnant of them will return. Destruction is decreed, overflowing with righteousness.

cnv.text: 以色列啊！你的人民雖然像海沙那樣多，卻只有餘剩的人可以歸回， 因為滅絕的事已經定了，公義必如洪水氾濫。

ccb.text: 以色列啊，你的人民虽多如海沙，将只有剩余的人归回。充满公义的毁灭之事已定。

csbs.text: 以色列啊，虽然你的子民多如海边的沙粒， 却只有其中的余剩者将回归。 灭绝已经注定， 公义必如水漫溢，
